---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What problem does this feature solve? _(Required — read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) "scope-limited" section first.)_

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

What else you tried or considered.

## Scope check

Does this require any of the following? TimerMówcy says **no** to these — see CONTRIBUTING.md:

- [ ] Firebase / Analytics / Crashlytics / cloud sync
- [ ] Accounts / login
- [ ] Voice prompts / AI features
- [ ] Heavy state management (Riverpod, BLoC, GetX)
- [ ] Google Play deployment

If you ticked any box, please open a **Discussion** first instead of an issue — there's likely a different way to solve the underlying need.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant (mockups, similar apps, etc.).
